title: ProDec 11 pc Professional Home Decorating Kit, Paint Rollers & Tray Set with Paint Brushes, Dust Sheet, Masking Tape - Roller Sets for Painting Walls & Ceilings with Emulsion, Mini Roller for Emulsion
features: This trade quality paint roller set contains everything you'll need for decorating projects big and small, It gives a high quality finish with all types of emulsion paints (eg. matt, silk, eggshell) and is ideal for painting contrast colours without the need to wash rollers mid-job, Rollers for painting emulsion paints on interior walls and ceilings

4x EMULSION ROLLERS & FRAMES: The 9” (225mm) paint rollers are ideal for walls and ceilings, and the 4” (100mm) mini rollers are ideal for smaller areas like window reveals, above doors and behind radiators, Made from high quality woven fabric that sheds virtually no pile and gives an incredibly smooth finish

2x PAINT BRUSHES: The 1” (25mm) and 1.5" All Purpose paint brushes are made from a trade quality mix of natural bristle and pure synthetic filaments, so they hold plenty of paint and give a smooth finish

DUST SHEET FOR DECORATING: Made from recyclable material, the high-quality 12' x 9' polythene dust sheet protects floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust and dirt, The generous 12’ x 9’ (3.7m x 2.7m) size will cover standard 3-seater sofas and most other furniture

50m ROLL MASKING TAPE: The 1" general purpose painting tape is made from high quality crepe paper that is compatible with all standard paint types including emulsion ,eggshell, gloss, satin and undercoat
PAINT ROLLER TRAY: The paint tray is made from 100% recycled plastic and features a textured area so rollers grip, giving even paint loading for smooth application
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint WHAT'S INSIDE THE PACK? - a quick look 2x 9" Paint Rollers - ideal for all emulsion paints, eg. Matt, Silk, Eggshell 2x 4" Mini Emulsion Rollers 9" and 4" Roller Frames 1" & 1.5" All Purpose Brushes - ideal for all types of paint whether you're cutting in edges with emulsion or painting woodwork 12' x 9' Polythene Dust Sheet - for protecting furniture and floors 1" Masking Tape 50m Roll - for sharp paint lines at adjacent surfaces 9" Paint Tray - also suitable for the mini rollers WHERE TO USE? 9" ROLLERS - interior walls, eg. plaster, drywall & ceilings (incl. light textures such as artex) MINI ROLLERS - small or tricky areas such as window surrounds, above doors, behind radiators & pipes BRUSHES - cutting in edges with emulsion, painting woodwork & metal WHAT'S INSIDE THE PACK? - a closer look 2x 9" emulsion rollers Ideal for fast painting of walls and ceilings, these rollers are made from high quality woven fabric that sheds minimal fibres, gives a high quality finish with minimal roller texture and is durable enough to be used again and again. 2x 4" emulsion mini rollers Ideal for smaller areas that wider rollers aren't suitable for, as well as tricky spots like behind radiators and pipes, these mini rollers are made from durable woven fabric like the 9" rollers. 9" and 4" roller frames These frames grip the rollers and hold them securely in place so they don't slip and slide about while you're painting, giving even application and a high quality finish. 1" & 1.5" paint brushes Ideal for cutting in and touching up with emulsion, as well as applying gloss, satin, undercoat or primer, the All Purpose brush holds plenty of paint and gives a smooth stroke for a high quality finish. 50m roll 1" Masking tape High quality crepe paper tape that is suitable for walls, wood surfaces such as skirting boards, architraves and window sills, metal, glass, mouldings, switches, sockets and more. Applies evenly and releases smoothly when peeled, leaving no residue. Polythene dust sheet Made from dustproof and waterproof LDPE material, the polythene sheet is lightweight and at 12' x 9' (3.7m x 2.7m) it drapes well over furniture of all shapes and sizes to protect against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust and dirt. 9" paint tray Made from 100% recycled plastic, this tray features a textured anti-skid area that enables rollers to grip, giving even paint loading for smooth application. It has a low centre of gravity so it won't easily tip over and spill paint.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎9" roller frame, 2x 9" rollers, mini roller frame, 2x mini rollers, 1" paint brush, 1.5" paint brush, 1" x 50m roll masking tape, 12'x9' polythene dust sheet, 9" paint tray
